Wind River (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $33,800,859Details
International Box Office $11,184,120
Worldwide Box Office $44,984,979
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,631,221
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,947,913
Total $7,579,134
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A rookie FBI agent who teams up with a local game tracker with deep community ties and a haunted past to investigate the murder of a local girl on a remote Native American Reservation in the hopes of solving her mysterious death.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$161,558 (0.5% of total gross)
Legs:5.42 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:75.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$11,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/2,890 max. theaters, 4.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $45,067,816

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 4th, 2017 (Limited) by Weinstein Co.
August 25th, 2017 (Expands Wide) by Weinstein Co.
International Releases: June 16th, 2017 (Wide) (Australia)
August 4th, 2017 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
August 4th, 2017 (Wide), released as Vėjų upė (Lithuania)
August 18th, 2017 (Wide) (Portugal)
September 1st, 2017 (Wide) (New Zealand)
Video Release: October 31st, 2017 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence, a rape, disturbing images, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2457 (Cert #50837), 1/4/2017)
Running Time: 107 minutes
Franchise: Wind River
Cast, crew, or production detail: Epilogue, Intertitle, Voiceover/Narration
Geographical setting: Wyoming
Plot point: Bigotry, Cabin Fever, Death of a Son or Daughter, FBI, Interracial Romance, Murder Mystery, Native Americans, Non-Chronological, Revenge, Sex Crimes, The Past Catching up with You, Vigilante
Source material: Inspired by a True Story
Subgenre: Crime Drama
Time period setting: 2010s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Acacia Entertainment, Synergics Films, The Fyzz Facility, Riverstone Pictures, Voltage Pictures, Wild Bunch, Star Thrower Entertainment, Tunica-Biloxi Tribe of Louisiana, Savvy Media Holdings, Thunder Road Film, Film 44
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

A rookie FBI agent who teams up with a local game tracker with deep community ties and a haunted past to investigate the murder of a local girl on a remote Native American Reservation in the hopes of solving her mysterious death.
